I used to play this game and now it’s just really weird there’s weird stuff and it will traumatize you if you play this, this game used to be a gorilla tag copy that had modes and it was fun but I don’t think this game is going to go back to the way it was so what ever you do… DON’T DOWNLOAD THIS GAME

This game has many and multiple scary videos/screens the first is the a creepy smiley face staring at you and sometimes even screaming.2nd one is the classic F25 screen which is a seizure video same thing as he original video.3rd is a creepy humanoid version of a dolphin wearing us about something.4rd is a Christmas video of it looks like a skinwalker version of a reindeer and breaks in and drills a Christmas tree to a kids head.

I’m giving 5 star so this is first or second or somewhere people can see don’t download the game something bad has happened idk if it got hacked or something but pls don’t play it there’s bad images that are loud and bright so pls don’t play it right now thank you for reading ily❤️
